episodes.title: The Ugly Truth About Clare Bronfman's Sex Cult
episodes.description:
How does a billionaire heiress transform a psychological slaughterhouse into an untouchable fortress? We expose the chilling reality of Clare Bronfman, the Seagram dynasty heir who weaponized her boundless fortune to silence, bankrupt, and legally terrorize the branded victims of the NXIVM cult. Discover how the ultimate enabler used her blank check to buy the silence that allowed a predator's cruelty to thrive


#ClareBronfman #NXIVM #KeithRaniere #WeaponizedWealth #TrueCrimeDocumentary #CultSurvivors #FinancialViolence #DarkHistory #BillionaireCrimes #JusticeSystem
